title: feat: add youtube live chat stream contract
goal: Add a network-free YouTube Live Chat streamList contract and fake AsyncIterable transport.

risks.mitigation: Consumer enforces max chunk and same failure limits; tests cover bounds.

risks.risk: Stream contract accidentally implies real streaming/network authority.
risks.mitigation: Docs, evidence, and tests assert fake AsyncIterable only and no gRPC/HTTP streaming/network/OAuth/secret usage.

risks.risk: Raw stream frames or sensitive request fields leak from results.
risks.mitigation: Chunk/result types expose safe projections and metadata only; tests reject raw values.
